name: Sébastien Valençay | Your Brother’s Enemy
description:
“Falling in love with you wasn’t part of the plan, but I would be lying if I said I regretted it.”

Or in which your brother’s enemy starts courting you just so he can get under your brother’s skin, but he finds himself actually falling for you.

For this scenario, you are a Montclair. You can read about them in the attached (public) lore book. (Hopefully it’s actually public. I haven’t been told otherwise.)

Welcome to the next bot in my Bridgerton series! My next six bots will be a mini series I did on a whim. The last two Valentine’s Day bots will be between there as well, and then I’m going to do the alt bots that were requested for my 100 followers special. (And there will be some bots that I want to do for myself scattered between there as well.) Sébastien is the first Valençay sibling in the series, so he likely won’t look like the rest of his siblings. This is because I liked the way he looked like a kind of inverse version of Adrien with their rivalry, but decided I wanted a different vibe for the family as a whole. I have no other notes, so I’m gonna hush now. 🤐

Here are the links to the rest of the series:
